content.title: RQBBOX OS — Portable USB Gaming Operating System
content.description: A portable USB-based gaming OS by RhysTech. PS5-inspired UI, pro audio engine, 43+ store packages, phone bootloader. Runs on Windows, macOS, Linux, Android, iOS, KaiOS.

fields.name: 🎮 Features
fields.value: 6 Native Games · 43+ Packages · PS5 UI · Pro Audio · Phone Bootloader · Multi-User · Plugin Engine

fields.name: 📱 Platforms
fields.value: Windows · macOS · Linux · Android · iOS · KaiOS
